items.title: Fake article claims Mbappé made sexual harassment allegations against Macron
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Norway crown princess's son to stay in custody before rape verdict, says court
items.dek: Thr ruling overturns a lower court's decision on Monday ordering the release of the crown princess's 29-year-old son.
items.body: Thr ruling overturns a lower court's decision on Monday ordering the release of the crown princess's 29-year-old son.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17, reports say
items.dek: Nine of them were killed in a series of attacks in the town of Tayr Debba, according to Lebanon's state news agency.
items.body: Nine of them were killed in a series of attacks in the town of Tayr Debba, according to Lebanon's state news agency.
items.author: IriLine Desk
